home.hero_title: Nri Ọgụgụ Isi. Ụlọ Ọrụ Ahụike.
home.hero_subtitle: BSF NutriFeed bụ nri ọkụkọ dị ọnụ ahịa mfe ma dịkwa mma nke e mere site na larvae nke Black Soldier Fly.
home.section_title: Kwụsị Ibi Ego Gị Maka Nri Dị Ọnụ Ahịa
home.section_body: Site na 2022, ọnụ ahịa nri ọkụkọ nke ọdịnala na Nigeria eruola ihe karịrị 60%. E wuru BSF NutriFeed dị ka ọzọzị ozugbo.
home.why_switch: Ihe Kpatara Ndị Ọrụ Ugbo Ji Gbanwee
home.edu_what_title: Gịnị Bụ Nri Black Soldier Fly?
home.edu_what_body: Larvae nke Black Soldier Fly nwere protein dị elu na abụba dị mma.
home.edu_safe_body: Ee. E nwale nri BSF ma jiri ya n'ọtụtụ ọchịchị Africa na Asia.
home.edu_trust_body: Ndị ọrụ ugbo site na Lagos ruo Kaduna na-eji BSF NutriFeed ugbu a.
home.step1_body: Tinye ọnụ ọgụgụ nnụnụ, ọkwa uto, na oge inye nri n'ime ihe mgbako anyị.
home.step2_body: Nweta ọnụ ọgụgụ nri nke e tụrụ ụbara ozugbo nke dabara na agbo gị.
home.step3_body: Lelee mmepụta nri, ọnụego uto, na ọkwa n'oge dị ndụ na deshbọọdụ ugbo gị.
home.quote_text: Kemgbe m gbanwere na BSF NutriFeed, ọnụ ahịa nri m adaala ihe fọrọ nke nta ka ọ bụrụ 40%.
home.quote_author: Amina Bello, Onye Ọrụ Ugbo Ọkụkọ — Steeti Kaduna
home.benefits_title: Kwalite Ahụike Ọkụkọ Site Na Nri Dabere Na Ọkọlọtọ
home.benefit1_body: Dị ọnụ ahịa mfe karịa nri ọdịnala — na-ebelata ọnụ ahịa ọnwa gị.
home.benefit2_body: E mere ya site na ihe mkpofu ọrụ, na-ebelata mmetụta gburugburu ọnọdụ na obodo gị.
home.benefit3_body: Protein dị elu site na larvae BSF na-akwado uto ngwa ngwa na anụ ụlọ dị mma.
home.cta_title: I Dị Njikere Iji Gbanwee Ugbo Gị?
home.cta_subtitle: Soro ndị ọrụ ugbo n'ofe Nigeria ndị na-esobelarị na-eji BSF NutriFeed.

calculator.title: Ihe Mgbako Nri
calculator.subtitle: Gbara ọnụ ọgụgụ ihe BSF NutriFeed ndị ọkụkọ gị chọrọ dabere na ọnọdụ ugbo gị.
calculator.how_title: Otu Ihe Mgbako A Si Arụ Ọrụ
calculator.how_subtitle: Ihe mgbako anyị na-eji ọnụego inye nri kwa ụbọchị nke e tụrụ ụbara:

dashboard.title: Deshbọọdụ Ugbo
dashboard.subtitle: Nlele dị ndụ nke ọrụ BSF NutriFeed gị.
dashboard.growth_weight_note: Maka nnụnụ ọ bụla ọnwa a
dashboard.alert_stock_low: Nri Mmalite na-adị ole — tụlee ịzụta ọzọ n'ime ụbọchị 5.
dashboard.alert_grower_stage: Nnụnụ Ụgbọ 3 na-abanye na ọkwa Uto izu a.
dashboard.alert_feeding_time: Oge inye nri na-esote: 8:00 n'ụtụtụ echi.
dashboard.alert_report_ready: Akụkọ uto kwa izu dị njikere maka nyocha.

learn.title: Ịghọta Nri BSF
learn.subtitle: Ihe niile onye ọrụ ugbo Nigeria kwesịrị ịmara maka nri Black Soldier Fly.
learn.article1_title: Ihe Kpatara Larvae Black Soldier Fly Ji Bụrụ Isi Mmalite Protein Kachasị Mma
learn.article1_body: Larvae Black Soldier Fly nwere protein ọhụrụ 40-45% na ntọala ihe nkọcha gbigbo — yiri fishmeal. N'adịghị ka ndị ọzọ dabere na soy, larvae BSF nwekwara lauric acid nke nwere ihe ndị na-egbu nje adịghị mma.
learn.article2_title: Ọ Dị Nchekwa Iji Nri Dabere Na Ahụhụ Maka Ọkụkọ Nigeria?
learn.article2_body: Ee. A kwadoro nri BSF ma nwale ya n'ọtụtụ ahịa Africa. Nyocha gosiri na ọ nweghị nsonaazụ ahụike ọjọọ. Ọnụego uto na FCR ha yiri ma ọ bụ karịa nke nri ọdịnala.
learn.article3_title: Nsogbu Ọnụ Ahịa Nri na Ihe Kpatara BSF Ji Bụrụ Ọzọzị
learn.article3_body: Site na 2022, ọnụ ahịa nri ọkụkọ ọdịnala na Nigeria eruo ihe karịrị 60%. Enwere ike ịmepụta larvae BSF n'ógbè site na iji ihe mkpofu ọrụ — ihe mkpofu kasava, ihe mkpofu akwụkwọ nri.
learn.article4_title: Otu Nri BSF Si Ebelata Ihe Mkpofu Na Nrụgide Gburugburu Ọnọdụ
learn.article4_body: Ọ bụ ọ bụla tọn nke larvae BSF emepụtara na-atụgharị ihe dị ka tọn 2-4 nke ihe mkpofu ọrụ ka ọ bụrụ nri.
learn.trust_title: E Wuru Ya N'ihe Akaebe, Ọ Bụghị Nkwa Naanị
learn.trust_body1: BSF NutriFeed dabere na nyocha ọrụ ugbo sitere na ụlọ ọmụmụ n'ofe Africa, Asia, na Europe.
learn.trust_body2: Ọ bụ na ị na-atụgharị site na ụdị nri ọdịnala, tụlee oge mgbanwe izu 2.

profile.title: Profaịlụ
profile.history_label: Akụkọ ihe gbasara ihe mgbako gị
profile.history_desc: Ihe mgbako nri niile arụrụ mgbe ị banye na akaụntụ echebara.
profile.export_desc: Budata otu oge nke data niile anyị nwere banyere gị.
profile.delete_desc: Hichapụ akaụntụ gị na data gị niile mgbe ụbọchị 30.

privacy.title: Data Gị Bụ Nke Gị
privacy.subtitle: Edere n'asụsụ dị mfe. Dabara na Iwu Nchekwa Data Nigeria 2023.
privacy.summary1_note: Ọ bụghị ndị na-ahụ maka mgbasa ozi. Ọ bụghị onye ọ bụla.
privacy.summary2_note: Hichapụ akaụntụ zuru ezu site na Ntọala.
privacy.summary4_note: Gbanwee mmasị kuki mgbe ọ bụla.
privacy.section1_title: Ihe Anyị Na-achịkọta na Ihe Anyị Anaghị Achịkọta
privacy.section1_body: Ọ bụ na ị na-eji ihe mgbako na-enweghị akaụntụ, anyị echebeghi ihe ọ bụla na sava anyị.
privacy.section2_title: Ihe Kpatara Anyị Ji Achịkọta Ya na Ihe Anyị Anaghị Eme Ya
privacy.section2_body: Anyị na-eji data gị iji rụọ akaụntụ gị na hazi ndụmọdụ nri gị. Anyị anaghị ere data gị.
privacy.section3_title: I Nwere Njikwa Zuru Ezu Nke Data Gị
privacy.section3_body: N'okpuru Iwu Nchekwa Data Nigeria 2023, i nwere ikike ịnweta, ịdozi, na ịhichapụ data niile anyị nwere banyere gị.
privacy.section4_title: Otu Anyị Si Echekwa Data Gị
privacy.section4_body: Data niile n'ụzọ na-echefusara na HTTPS. Paswọọdụ echebara site na bcrypt hashing.
privacy.section5_body: Kuki dị mkpa na-eme ka ị banye ma chefuo ntọala gị. Kuki nyocha bụ nhọrọ ma enweghị aha.
privacy.section6_body: Ziga imeyi na privacy@nutrifeed.ng maka ajụjụ data ọ bụla. Anyị na-azaghachi n'ime awa 48.
privacy.manage_body: I nweghị ike ịmelite nkwenye kuki gị mgbe ọ bụla.

terms.title: Iwu Ojiji BSF NutriFeed
terms.subtitle: Asụsụ dị mfe. Enweghị jargon iwu. Emelitere ikpeazụ Eprel 2026.
terms.section1_body: Site na ịmepụta akaụntụ na BSF NutriFeed, i kwenyere na Usoro na Ọnọdụ ndị a.
terms.section2_body: I dị ndụ iji chekwa nzube nnwale ọbanye gị. I kwesịghị ịkere akaụntụ gị na onye ọ bụla ọzọ.
terms.section3_body: Ị nwere ike iji BSF NutriFeed naanị maka ebumnuche iwu metụtara njikwa nri ugbo.
terms.section4_body: Ihe mgbako nri na-enye atụmatụ dabere na ọnụego inye nri kwa ụbọchị. Ndị a bụ ndụmọdụ naanị.
terms.section5_body: Data i tinye na BSF NutriFeed bụ nke gị. Anyị na-eji ya naanị iji nye ọrụ ahụ.
terms.section6_body: Anyị nwere ike ịmelite usoro ndị a ka ikpo ọkụ na-eto eto. Anyị ga-eziga imeyi gị opekata mpe ụbọchị 14 tupu ha abata n'ọrụ.
terms.section7_body: Maka ajụjụ banyere Usoro ndị a, kpọtụrụ anyị na legal@nutrifeed.ng.
terms.cta_body: Ọ bụrụ na ihe ọ bụla n'usoro ndị a adighi nke ọma, kpọtụrụ anyị tupu i mepụta akaụntụ.

settings.title: Ntọala
settings.feed_alerts_desc: Nweta ọkwa mgbe nri na-acha ọkọlọtọ.
settings.weekly_report_desc: Nweta nchịkọta nke ihe ntụle ugbo gị kwa izu.

language.title: Asụsụ
language.coming_soon: Ntụgharị asụsụ zuru ezu na-abịa n'oge na-adịghị anya.

help.title: Nweta Enyemaka
help.subject_account: Nsogbu akaụntụ ma ọ bụ ịbanye
help.message_placeholder: Kọwaa ajụjụ ma ọ bụ nsogbu gị...
help.sent_body: Daalụ maka ikpọtụrụ anyị. Anyị ga-azaghachi gị n'ime awa 48.

consent.title: Anyị na-asọpụrụ nzuzo gị
consent.body: NutriFeed na-eji kuki iji mee ka ngwa ahụ arụọ ọrụ ma, n'ụzọ nhọrọ, ịghọta otú ndị ọrụ ugbo si eji ihe mgbako ahụ. Anyị anaghị ere data gị.
consent.essential_desc: Achọrọ maka ịbanye na nchọgharị. Enweghị ike ịkụzị ya.
consent.analytics_desc: Data enweghị aha gbasara atụmatụ ndị ọrụ ugbo na-eji kachasị.
consent.personalisation_desc: Chekwaa mmasị ihe mgbako gị n'etiti ọbịa.

auth.login_subtitle: Banye iji hụ deshbọọdụ ugbo gị na akụkọ ihe gbasara nri.
auth.signup_subtitle: Sọ ọnụ ọgụgụ nri gị ma nweta ndụmọdụ pụrụ iche.
